DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, FEB-28-2020 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT 20MISSION SF LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF RYAN SINGER TO (1) RESPOND TO FORM INTERROGATORIES- SET ONE; (2) RESPOND TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCITON OF DOCUMENTS- SET ONE; (3) DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED; AND (4) PAY MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE HEREBY DEEMED ADMITTED. VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ONE TO BE SERVED NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $535.00 TO BE PAID NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2020 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication [Ccp Secs 437c And 1170.7]
Off Calendar Jun-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Raymond Yetka, 415.357.0600 for Defendant Jered Kenna.
No other appearance.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Defendant shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Defendant to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). Order signed and judgment signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff Ryan Singer To (1) Respond To Form Interrogatories- Set One; (2) Respond To Request For Produciton Of Documents- Set One; (3) Deem Matters Admitted; And (4) Pay Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. RAY YETKA, ESQ. of Utrecht & Lenvin, LLP (Tel: 415-357-0600) appearing for defendant 20Mission SF LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT 20MISSION SF LLC'S Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff Ryan Singer To (1) Respond To Form Interrogatories- Set One; (2) Respond To Request For Produciton Of Documents- Set One; (3) Deem Matters Admitted; And (4) Pay Monetary Sanctions.

Defense counsel stipulates to the pro tem judge. Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed. All Requests for Admission are hereby deemed admitted. Verified responses to Form Interrogatories Set One and Request for Production of Documents Set One to be served no later than 10 days after notice of entry of order. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $535.00 to be paid no later than 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Set For Trial On Jul-27-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
